markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review client strategy sprint progress and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Check That Tool for Client Buy-in:** George is onboarding Brex and Turnstile to the "Check That" prompt research tool. This is a key week 1–3 win, as Brex's stakeholder, John, is already requesting a seat, proving the tool's value and securing budget.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [**Navan Strategy Refined for Business Impact:** Following feedback from decision-maker Nima, the Navan strategy is being updated to explicitly link content to business goals (e.g., product support, CTAs) in Airtable, shifting focus from pure traffic to conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
  - [**Hex Converts to Phase 2:** Hex confirmed its Phase 2 conversion. Sydney is creating the operating manual for the January 5th handoff to the stabilized pod, and Aida will lead the live client intro.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)
  - [**Publishing Unblocked for Cresta & Vizcom:** Cresta's new "Guides" section is ready, unblocking publishing. Vizcom's content is CMS-staged, pending the new website launch.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)

## Topics

### Client Strategy & Handoffs

  - [**Navan (Review Flag):**](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
      - [**Problem:** Nima, the decision-maker, wants to see a clear connection between content topics and business impact.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
      - [**Solution:** Aida is developing a business prioritization framework for Airtable to link content to:](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
          - [Funnel stage (ToFu/BoFu)](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
          - [Supporting products](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
          - [Specific CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Awaiting Navan's legal team review process.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
  - [**Hex (Phase 2 Conversion):**](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)
      - [**Status:** Confirmed Phase 2 conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)
      - [**Handoff:** Sydney is creating the operating manual for the January 5th handoff to the stabilized pod (Khalil & Matt). Aida will lead the live client intro.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1912.0)
      - [**Production:** 15 articles assigned for the next 3 weeks. Aida will discuss prioritizing the remaining 7 approved ideas with the client on Thursday.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [**Read.ai (Phase 2 Decision Due):**](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
      - [**Status:** 9–10 articles published and indexing. Phase 2 decision is due by next Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
      - [**Objection:** Client Sarah questioned recommending competitors (e.g., Gong) in listicles.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is necessary to meet search intent and rank. The strategy is to give Read.ai's description twice the length of competitors' and maintain a neutral tone.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
  - [**Redis (Handoff Prep):**](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=2064.0)
      - [**Status:** 3 articles ready for publishing pending client feedback. Production is on track.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=2064.0)
      - [**Handoff:** Erik O'Brien will become the engagement manager.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=2097.0)

### Content Production & Publishing

  - [**Cresta:**](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Tone adjustments and positioning Cresta as a "holistic platform."](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
      - [**Publishing:** Unblocked. The new "Guides" section is live. The first refresh will be staged in the CMS this week.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [**Vizcom:**](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
      - [**Status:** 4 articles are CMS-staged (Webflow pod 0) pending the new website launch.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
      - [**Blocker:** The new website launch date (originally 12/15) is unknown. Aida will get an update today.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
  - [**Ramp:**](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
      - [**Status:** GSC/GA4 are set up. 6 articles are awaiting indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
      - [**Production:** 20+ articles are ready. The goal is to publish 5 articles/week, including during "quiet week," to maintain momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [**Brex:**](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
      - [**Status:** Client John approved the content OS. 3 blogs are in production this week.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
      - [**Upsell Opportunity:** Client Alex is scoping a Sanity CMS rebuild with an agency. George is engaging to position GrowthX for the work.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [**Turnstile:**](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
      - [**Status:** William is revising the content strategy draft based on Aida's feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
      - [**Goal:** Present a sample topic cluster plan to the client tomorrow to enable starting a calibration piece.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [**Blaxel:**](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
      - [**Status:** All artifacts are complete. William and Kathy can begin the content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)

### Internal Processes & Tooling

  - [**"Check That" Prompt Research Tool:**](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
      - [**Purpose:** A new tool to standardize prompt research and demonstrate value to clients early.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
      - [**Rollout:** George is setting up Brex and Turnstile. Aida will onboard all other clients (e.g., Vizcom, read.ai).](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
      - [**Pricing:** The tool is currently included in engagements. George will define the long-term pricing model.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [**Operating Manuals:**](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=2126.0)
      - [**Need:** Aida requires support creating operating manuals for clients without a dedicated Engagement Manager (EM) (e.g., Read.ai).](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=2126.0)
      - [**Action:** Sydney will provide a template and support to streamline the process.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=2126.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**George:**](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
      - [Onboard Brex and Turnstile to "Check That" by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
      - [Define the long-term pricing model for "Check That."](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
      - [Check Natalie's capacity for editing support (Navan, Read.ai).](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
      - [Develop the Navan business prioritization framework for Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
      - [Get an update on Vizcom's new website launch date.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
      - [Lead the live client intro for the Hex handoff on Thursday.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1952.0)
  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
      - [Revise the Turnstile content strategy draft.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
      - [Send all Turnstile artifacts to the client today.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [**Sydney:**](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)
      - [Finalize the Hex operating manual and editing checklist.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1912.0)
      - [Provide Aida with the operating manual template.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=2126.0)
  - [**Hassan:**](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - [Record a Loom of the product deep dive artifact creation process for George.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [**Kavishka:**](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
      - [Stage the Cresta refresh article in the CMS this week.](https://fathom.video/share/cz8YJe3qMMiERyKKa3V5E8sxF12mpyQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
